creator: akruijff@dds.nl
text:
Trying to install 9.1. on a raid disk results in the error "error installing partcode on partion raid r0p1".

Screenshots can be found here:
http://forum.lissyara.su/viewtopic.php?f=53&t=39081

Fix: 

The previous installer didn't have any problems.
How-To-Repeat: Try to install FreeBSD using the new installer
